Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\); const files=["screens/doctor/DoctorDashboardScreen.tsx","screens/doctor/DoctorOutgoingScreen.tsx","screens/doctor/DoctorCreateUpdateScreen.tsx","screens/RequestsScreen.tsx","screens/EditProfileScreen.tsx","components/SharedRecordCard.tsx"]; files.forEach\(f=>{let c=fs.readFileSync\(f,"utf8"\); c=c.replace\(/\\\\\([^\\x00-\\x7F]\)/g,"$1"\); fs.writeFileSync\(f,c,"utf8"\); console.log\("fixed",f\);}\)')

Bash(node -e 'const fs=require\("fs"\); const files=["screens/doctor/DoctorDashboardScreen.tsx","screens/doctor/DoctorOutgoingScreen.tsx","screens/doctor/DoctorCreateUpdateScreen.tsx","screens/RequestsScreen.tsx","screens/EditProfileScreen.tsx","components/SharedRecordCard.tsx"]; files.forEach\(f=>{let c=fs.readFileSync\(f,"utf8"\); const re=new RegExp\("\\\\\\\\\([^\\\\x00-\\\\x7F]\)","g"\); c=c.replace\(re,"$1"\); fs.writeFileSync\(f,c,"utf8"\); console.log\("fixed",f\);}\)')
